testcase.name: contextLoads
testcase.system-out:
13:22:03.513 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.photoalbum.PhotoAlbumApplicationTests]: PhotoAlbumApplicationTests does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 13:22:03.665 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.photoalbum.PhotoAlbumApplication for test class com.photoalbum.PhotoAlbumApplicationTests 13:22:03.912 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.devtools.restart.RestartApplicationListener -- Restart disabled due to context in which it is running
